description: You have returned from a two-week vacation to an overflowing inbox containing 50 unread emails. Triage the inbox by flagging at least 5 urgent emails, deleting at least 10 irrelevant emails, and moving at least 8 reference emails into a new folder named 'Archive'. Additionally, send a 'Back in Office' email to team@projectalpha.org with a subject mentioning your return and a body stating you are catching up. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
